cards.name: CIBC Dividend Visa Infinite

shoppers_drug_mart.note: Shoppers Drug Mart is MCC 5912 (pharmacy), not 5411 (grocery). Earns the recurring/bills rate, NOT the 4% grocery rate.

costco.note: Costco is MCC 5300 (wholesale). Earns base rate. Also: Visa not accepted in-store at Costco Canada.

walmart.note: Walmart is MCC 5310 (general merchandise), not grocery. Earns base rate.

cards.override_notes: No category caps confirmed. First-year fee waived ($0). Credit score 660+ is community estimate (Visa Infinite tier).

cards.name: Scotiabank Gold American Express Card

costco.note: Costco is wholesale MCC. Also: Amex not accepted in-store at Costco Canada.

walmart.note: Walmart is general merchandise MCC, not grocery.

shoppers_drug_mart.note: UNCONFIRMED: Shoppers is MCC 5912 (pharmacy). Scotia T&C says 'grocery stores'. Conservatively stored as 1x until confirmed.

cards.override_notes: Scene+ points at 1 cpp. $50K/yr COMBINED cap across all accelerated categories (grocery+dining+food delivery+entertainment+streaming+gas+transit). Stored as $4166.67/month equivalent. No FX fee. Empire grocery stores (Sobeys, Safeway, FreshCo, Foodland, IGA, Farm Boy) earn 6x instead of 5x — not modelled separately in this seed; store_override can be added per Empire store. First-year fee waived.

cards.name: PC Financial World Elite Mastercard

shoppers_drug_mart.note: PC Financial explicitly defines Shoppers Drug Mart / Pharmaprix at 50x (5% equivalent). This is the highest earn rate on this card.

loblaws.note: Loblaw banner stores (Loblaws, No Frills, Real Canadian Superstore, Maxi, Joe Fresh) earn 40x (4% equivalent).

costco.note: Costco is wholesale MCC. Mastercard accepted in-store. Earns base 1% (10x).

walmart.note: Walmart is general merchandise MCC. Earns base 1% (10x).

cards.override_notes: PC Optimum points: 1 point = $0.001. 10x=$0.01 per $1 (1%), 40x=$0.04 per $1 (4%), 50x=$0.05 per $1 (5%). Redeemable only at Loblaw stores. Esso/Mobil gas earns 30 pts/litre (complex, approximated as base rate here). No annual fee. IMPORTANT: PrinceOfTravel shows regular PC MC rates, not World Elite. World Elite rates confirmed from official pcfinancial.ca embedded JSON.

cards.name: Rogers Red World Elite Mastercard

costco.note: Flat-rate card. Mastercard accepted at Costco in-store. Earns 1.5% (non-Rogers customer rate).

cards.override_notes: Flat-rate card: 1.5% on all CAD purchases (non-Rogers/Fido/Shaw customers), 2.0% for Rogers/Fido/Shaw customers, 3% on USD purchases. Rates stored here are the NON-Rogers-customer rates (conservative). Rogers customer rate (2%) can be modelled via a config flag or separate card entry. 1.5x redemption bonus when applied to Rogers/Fido/Shaw bills (not modelled — requires user flag). Renamed from 'Rogers World Elite Mastercard' on April 9, 2024. No annual fee. No minimum spend requirement (removed April 2024).

cards.name: American Express Cobalt Card

costco.note: Costco is wholesale MCC. Also: Amex not accepted in-store at Costco Canada.

walmart.note: Walmart is general merchandise MCC, not grocery.

shoppers_drug_mart.note: Shoppers Drug Mart is MCC 5912 (pharmacy). Amex MR grocery rate uses MCC 5411. Community consensus: earns 1x at Shoppers.

cards.override_notes: Amex MR points at 2.0 cpp default. $2,500/month COMBINED cap on 'Eats & Drinks' categories (grocery+dining+food delivery). After cap, all three revert to 1x for remainder of month. Billed monthly at $15.99/month ($191.88/yr). No first-year fee waiver. Amex does not publish income minimums — $15K is community estimate with low confidence. Transferable to Aeroplan 1:1, Avios 1:1, Marriott 5:6, etc.
